tool_calls.name: get_manual_page
tool_calls.result_preview:
# Cypher patterns and anti-patterns

**Pre-condition.** Call `get_graph_schema()` (relationship labels) and
`get_templates_index()` (verbatim semanticIds) before composing any
Cypher. Invented labels

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString)
WHERE dn.text CONTAINS 'Hall 4' OR dn.text CONTAINS 'Hall4'
RETURN aas.id, aas.idShort, dn.text AS name

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(desc:LangString)
RETURN aas.id, aas.idShort, dn.text AS name, desc.text AS description

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(elem)
RETURN elem.idShort, labels(elem) AS types, elem.smId
LIMIT 50

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)
MATCH (entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm2:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN entity.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, aas.id, aas.idShort, collect(DISTINCT sc.id) AS semanticIds

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
RETURN aas.id, aas.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/CapabilityDescription/1/0'})
MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
RETURN aas.id, aas.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:mir100:001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (instance)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
RETURN instance.id, instance.idShort, type.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)
MATCH (entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
WHERE entity.idShort STARTS WITH 'MiR'
RETURN entity.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, aas.id, aas.idShort

1. An AssetLocation submodel on the robot AAS instances showing their current location

3. A DERIVED_FROM relationship showing instance-to-type derivation with location context

Would you like me to search the PDF documentation of these robots for any location-related information, or do you have additional context about how location tracking is implemented in your system?
